summary: Tested 2 bug fixes: 1) Commission skip_deposit flag - POST /api/profit/commission with skip_deposit=true saves commission but does NOT create deposit (PASS), skip_deposit=false or default creates deposit (PASS). 2) Publitio reads from correct collection - /api/publitio/test reads from db.platform_settings not db.settings (PASS). Frontend Adjust Commission dialog shows 'Display only (don't add to balance)' checkbox (PASS). Platform Settings page loads without black screen (PASS).

issues: DialogContent console warning about missing Description for screen reader accessibility - non-blocking cosmetic issue
Console warning about chart width/height being -1 on initial render - non-blocking cosmetic issue

seed_data_creation: Created test commission records during backend testing (skip_deposit=true/false tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two fixes verified: 1) CommissionCreate model has skip_deposit: bool = False field (line 50 of profit_routes.py). When true, commission is saved but no deposit is created. Response includes 'deposit_created' field. 2) Publitio get_publitio_creds() reads from db.platform_settings (line 24 of publitio.py). Note: Publitio keys are empty in DB so /test returns configured=false - this is expected. Frontend Adjust Commission dialog checkbox uses data-testid='skip-deposit-checkbox'.

skip_deposit_commission.skip_deposit_true: PASS - Commission saved, NO deposit created, deposit_created=false in response
skip_deposit_commission.skip_deposit_false: PASS - Commission saved, deposit created with product='COMMISSION'
skip_deposit_commission.default_behavior: PASS - Without skip_deposit field, defaults to false (creates deposit)

publitio_settings_collection.test_endpoint: PASS - /api/publitio/test returns configured=false (reads from platform_settings, keys empty)
publitio_settings_collection.folders_endpoint: PASS - /api/publitio/folders returns 503 when not configured (correct behavior)

frontend_adjust_commission_dialog.dialog_opens: PASS - Clicking commission cell in Daily View opens Adjust Commission dialog
frontend_adjust_commission_dialog.checkbox_present: PASS - 'Display only (don't add to balance)' checkbox visible
frontend_adjust_commission_dialog.helper_text: PASS - 'Use this for backfilling historical commissions that are already reflected in your account value'

platform_settings_page.page_loads: PASS - No black screen, page renders correctly
platform_settings_page.tabs_visible: PASS - SEO & Meta, Branding, UI Settings, API Keys, Links, Emails, Maintenance, Security
platform_settings_page.master_admin_section: PASS - Global Trading, Banners & Popups, Habit Tracker, Affiliate Center, Diagnostics
